testing_centers.provider: INAP — Instituto Nacional de Administración Pública
Regional Government / Municipal Exam Centers (varies by convocatoria)

id_requirements: Valid Spanish DNI (Documento Nacional de Identidad) or NIE + supporting ID
exam_rules: Pen-and-paper, written multiple-choice (tipo test) and/or practical exercises. No mobile phones, calculators, or study materials. Negative marking: -0.33 per wrong answer (varies by convocatoria). Answer blank = 0 marks.
renewal_options: Funcionarios de carrera have permanent status; no expiry. Continuing education (formación continua) available but not mandatory for retention.

prerequisites.description: Bachillerato or equivalent; driver's licence (C); age 18–40 (varies by body); physical fitness requirements

retake_policy.notes: One official call (convocatoria) per year per body; no limit on attempts across years until age limit

domains.name: Firefighting Techniques, Fire Behavior, and Extinction Methods
Rescue and Extrication (traffic accidents, urban rescue, confined spaces)
First Aid and Emergency Medical Response (RCP, trauma, burns)
Fire Prevention Regulations (CTE-DB-SI, industrial fire safety regulations)

official_study_resources.title: Temario Oficial — BOE (Boletín Oficial del Estado)

aliases: oposiciones bombero bombero conductor municipal autonómico
